semantic.role: Vitest test suite for validating index-based resume recovery and LLM retry mechanisms in the ArchSpine system.
responsibilities: Creates isolated temporary directories for each test case to avoid side effects.
Mocks LLM summarization task failures to simulate retry scenarios.
Verifies the system correctly recovers from partial or corrupted index states.
Cleans up test artifacts after each test run to maintain a pristine environment.
outOfScope: Production logic for summarization or index recovery.
Integration tests with external LLM services.
Performance or load testing of the recovery mechanism.
invariants: Test files must end with .test.ts or .spec.ts (rule: test-file-suffix).

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Ensure robust index-based resume recovery and LLM retry logic through isolated, deterministic test scenarios.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Resolve lint errors and finalize pipeline fixes before v1.0, aligning test structure with project conventions.

English.role: Vitest test suite for validating index-based resume recovery and LLM retry mechanisms in the ArchSpine system.
responsibilities: Creates isolated temporary directories for each test case to avoid side effects.
Mocks LLM summarization task failures to simulate retry scenarios.
Verifies the system correctly recovers from partial or corrupted index states.
Cleans up test artifacts after each test run to maintain a pristine environment.
outOfScope: Production logic for summarization or index recovery.

Simplified Chinese.role: 用于验证 ArchSpine 系统中基于索引的恢复和 LLM 重试机制的 Vitest 测试套件。
responsibilities: 为每个测试用例创建隔离的临时目录，避免副作用。
模拟 LLM 摘要任务失败，以测试重试场景。
验证系统能够从部分或损坏的索引状态中正确恢复。
每次测试运行后清理测试工件，保持环境整洁。
outOfScope: 摘要或索引恢复的生产逻辑。
与外部 LLM 服务的集成测试。
恢复机制的性能或负载测试。
